title: Market Mind State Schema
description: Schema skeleton for recording daily market cognition state as research history. Version 1.1 adds state classification and narrative age fields. This structure is not production scoring.
validation_notes: This schema is for Market Mind research history only.
Market Mind records must not directly change Theme Score, Stage Score, Decision Score, or production trading logic.
G-013 research content should be written only after it is completed and approved.
This schema must not modify runtime, pipeline, Dashboard, or scoring.
